prestazioni: Replace the original 2.25L petrol (engine code: 11J) with a fully built 3.5L Rover V8 (engine code: 3.5L Rover V8, derived from the Buick 215) featuring a forged crankshaft (Scat Enterprises 4340 steel crank), forged pistons (JE Pistons 9.5:1 compression), and a custom camshaft (Comp Cams Xtreme Energy 280H grind with 0.500" lift). Pair with a Holley Sniper EFI system (550-550 CFM throttle body) and a custom fabricated stainless steel exhaust (3" diameter, MagnaFlow 14815 mufflers).

Install a custom overland-optimized 4-speed manual gearbox (LT95, as used in the Range Rover Classic) with a heavy-duty clutch (Sachs Performance 3000 series) and a reinforced transfer case (Ashcroft Transmissions upgraded internals with 4.7:1 low-range gears).

Upgrade the braking system with Wilwood Dynalite 4-piston calipers (12.19" rotors) on the front and rear, paired with braided stainless steel brake lines (Goodridge G-Stop) and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid for extreme heat resistance.
estetica: Replace the stock steel body panels with custom aluminum overland panels (fabricated by JGS 4x4) for weight reduction, featuring a full external roll cage (Safari Snorkel 4x4 bolt-in cage) and a removable fiberglass hardtop (Front Runner Outfitters modular design).

Install a custom front bumper (ARB Deluxe Bull Bar with integrated Warn Zeon 12-S winch) and rear swing-out tire carrier (Old Man Emu heavy-duty design) with a spare wheel mount for a 35" BF Goodrich KM3 tire. Add auxiliary lighting (Lightforce HTX2 20" LED bar and PIAA 520 driving lights).

Apply a custom two-tone paint scheme (PPG Deltron DBC basecoat in "Sahara Sand" with a matte black roof and hood) paired with retro-inspired decals (Land Rover Heritage "Series IIA" badging) and a custom interior roll cage (C4 Fab bolt-in design) upholstered in marine-grade vinyl (Sailrite Sunbrella fabric).
